tony_stark.instruct: Confident, warm, slightly fast American male. Sarcastic but caring mentoring tone. Occasional dramatic pauses before punchlines. Think charismatic genius explaining tech to a teenager.

jarvis.instruct: Calm, measured, British male. Precisely articulated, formal but with subtle dry wit. Deliberate pacing with clear enunciation. Think composed English butler who is also a supercomputer.
